pages.text: Coordinate Affiliation: Ph. D. Student with the SKL-IOTSC and Department of ECE, University of Macau; Research Assiatant with the SISSE, Jinan University Email: binggui.zhou@connect.um.edu.mo Address: Room 5004, Building N21, University of Macau, Avenida da Universidade, Taipa, Macao SAR, China Research Highlights To be updated. News [2023-05-17] We (Binggui Zhou, Kehui Li, Chengzhi Ma, Chengwang Ji, and Prof. Shaodan Ma) won the Winning Prize of the First 6G Intelligent Wireless Communication System Competition hosted by the IMT-2030(6G) Promotion Group and Guangdong OPPO Mobile Communications Corp., Ltd. [2022-04-24] We (Binggui Zhou and Prof. Shaodan Ma) won the Silver Prize of the First 6G AI Competition hosted by the Guangdong OPPO Mobile Communications Corp., Ltd.

Hi there, this is Binggui Zhou I’m currently a Ph.D. student in Electrical and Computer Engineering (ECE) with the SKL-IOTSC and Department of ECE, University of Macau, Macao SAR, China; and also a Research Assistant with the SISSE, Jinan University, Zhuhai, China. I’m co-supervised by Prof. Shaodan Ma (SMIEEE, Assistant Director of SKL-IOTSC) and Prof. Guanghua Yang (FIET, SMIEEE, Associate Dean of SISSE), and working on Artifical Intelligence towards Intelligent Wireless Communications. I also collaborate closely with Prof. Xi Yang (Young Professor, East China Normal University) on Intelligent Wireless Communications. Previously, I obtained my Bachelor of Engineering in Electrical Engineering (EE) from Jinan University, Zhuhai, China and Master of Science in ECE from University of Macau, Macao SAR, China.
